title: Fifteen Tasks But a Game Ain't One!
tagline: Escape the loop of your boring job... and chase your dreams!
description: A GMTK 2025 jam entry. Play as an employee stuck in a loop of mundane tasks — click and drag to do your job, but sneak in job applications on your phone when the boss isn't looking.
longDescription:
**Fifteen Tasks But a Game Ain't One!** was made for the **GMTK 2025 Game Jam**.

## Concept

You play as an employee trapped in the repetitive loop of a boring office job. Each day you're assigned tasks to complete — click and drag objects to get the work done. But secretly, you're applying for your dream job.

Press **Spacebar** to pull out your smartphone and submit job applications, but be careful — if the boss catches you, your freedom meter drops. Balance completing mundane duties with chasing your dreams.

## How It Works

The core tension comes from managing two competing goals:
- **Complete your assigned tasks** to keep your job
- **Sneak in job applications** on your phone without getting caught

The "freedom" meter tracks your progress — fail too many applications and you're stuck in the loop forever.

## Team

Built by a team of 3: ShinyGami, mai.michael.dev, and DarthPoppo.
techHighlights: Stealth mechanic — boss detection for phone usage
